description_long: This is a large, three-story brick house with a prominent black hip roof and a spacious, landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. The front facade features a covered porch with columns, a central entry door, and symmetrical windows on each level. To the left, there is an attached garage with a driveway and a metal gate, while the right side of the property includes a patio area, outdoor seating, and a small pool or hot tub. The house is surrounded by well-maintained greenery, including bushes, trees, and flower beds, adding to its suburban charm. The rear of the house has a glass-covered patio and additional garden space, providing ample outdoor living areas. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A large, three-story brick house with a black hip roof, attached garage, landscaped yard, and outdoor living spaces including a patio and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, symmetrical windows, attached garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tall brick facade, garage, driveway, and lush greenery along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glass-covered patio, outdoor seating area, pool, and extensive backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the side entrance, garden, pool, and a clear view of the yard's layout and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, steps, and a decorative front door
